discovery.__: Where the company/sector pages are — explicit, no LLM guessing.

rules.__: Deterministic guards applied AFTER the LLM extracts each page.
rules.__name_must_be_heading: OPTIONAL strict gate: keep only names that are page headings. Off by default — it drops real brands that live in cards/text (Wai Wai, Rio, CG Electronics). The generic prompt already blocks hallucination, so we don't need this gate; enable only for very noisy sites.
rules.__division_from: Each sector page IS the division (page provenance). Options: page | section.
rules.__nest: A brand may nest under a subsidiary; never brand->brand or sibling->sibling.
